name: Beef Stew with Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a stew pot, heat oil over high heat.
2. Dredge the meat in flour and quickly sear a few pieces at a time until browned.
3. Add onions, carrots, celery, and water to the pot with the meat; simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Add the remaining ingredients except peas; mix well and simmer on low heat until the meat is tender and vegetables are cooked.
5. Remove the bay leaf and adjust seasoning if necessary.
6. Just before serving, add peas and serve the stew over biscuits.
Baking Powder Biscuits:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. In a bowl, sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Cut in shortening until crumbly.
4. Combine milk and beaten egg; mix into the flour mixture with a fork until just moistened.
5. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently.
6. Roll to 3/4-inch thickness. Cut with a 2-inch figure-eight cutter and place on an ungreased baking tray.
7. Bake for 12 minutes or until golden.
